text: Last year, I led a global rollout.
I have worked with teams in India and the US.
I have handled many difficult clients.
So, Patrícia, tell me a bit about your background. How long have you been in customer success?
I have worked in customer success for about eight years. I joined Salesforce in 2019.
That is impressive. And what did you do before Salesforce?
Previously, I worked as an account manager at a fintech company. I handled our largest clients there.
Great experience. What is your biggest achievement so far?
So far, I have led three major rollouts, and I have never missed a renewal. I am very proud of that.

Hi Patrícia, it is great to finally meet you. I have worked in customer success for about ten years now. I started my career in technical support, and later I moved into account management. Previously, I worked at a smaller software company for five years. I have led several big projects, and I have handled many difficult clients. So far, this is the best team I have ever worked with. I am really looking forward to working with you.

Hi Patrícia, this is Sandra from the global onboarding team. I just wanted to introduce myself before our call tomorrow. I have been with the company for three years, and I have supported more than thirty premium accounts. Last year, I managed the onboarding for two of our biggest clients in Europe. Recently, I joined the customer experience group, so we will work together often. I have heard great things about your background. Talk to you soon.
